description: Triggers for translating skills and experience from one industry to another

queries.query: I'm leaving the military and need to translate my experience to civilian business roles
Help me pivot from teaching to product management — translate my skills
I'm a nurse transitioning to healthcare tech — how do I reframe my experience?
Translate my 10 years in government into private sector resume language
I'm a lawyer moving into consulting — help me position my transferable skills
Convert my academic research background into industry-relevant language
I need to translate my nonprofit experience for corporate job applications
Help me reframe my journalism career for marketing or content strategy roles
I'm pivoting from finance to data science — what transferable skills should I highlight?
Translate my skills from one industry to another for my resume and LinkedIn
Write me a resume for a marketing manager role
Optimize my LinkedIn headline for software engineering roles
How do I quantify my resume bullets?
Format my resume in ATS-compatible style
Help me negotiate my job offer
Write STAR stories for my product manager interview
Build me an academic CV for postdoc applications
Create a cover letter for a software engineer role
Help me build a reference list for my job applications
Compare these two job offers I received
